sql.query: INSERT INTO tbl_spaces (tenantId,locationId,spaceName,spaceType,defaultCapacity,isActive) SELECT :tenantId,l.id,:spaceName,NULLIF(:spaceType,''),NULLIF(:defaultCapacity,''),1 FROM tbl_locations l WHERE l.id=:locationId AND l.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND l.isActive=1 LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,afterJson,createdDate) SELECT :tenantId,:userId,'space',:entityId,'space.created',CONCAT(:actor,' created space ',:spaceName,' at ',l.locationName),JSON_OBJECT('locationId',l.id,'locationName',l.locationName,'spaceName',:spaceName2,'spaceType',:spaceType,'defaultCapacity',NULLIF(:capacity,''),'isActive',1),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tbl_locations l WHERE l.id=:locationId AND l.tenantId=:tenantId2 LIMIT 1
